data.title: EU Officials Reevaluate Digital Euro Strategy Amid U.S. Stablecoin Legislation
data.description: According to PANews, European Central Bank (ECB) officials are reconsidering their approach to the digital euro following the passage of the U.S. stablecoin legislation. Recent reports indicate that European authorities are exploring the possibility of utilizing public blockchains like Ethereum or Solana for the digital euro, diverging from the previously anticipated private blockchain solutions due to privacy concerns. The ECB has confirmed that various technologies, including centralized, decentralized, and distributed ledger technologies, are under consideration for the digital euro's development. However, no final decision has been made regarding the technological framework to be adopted.

data.title: Ethereum News: Ethereum Rally Gains Momentum, On-Chain Growth and Investor Optimism Pave Path to $5K ETH
data.description: Key Takeaways:Ethereum network activity surged 63% in 30 days, boosting bullish momentum.Futures open interest sits at $69B, showing strong leveraged demand.ETH price hit $4,701, its highest in nearly 4 years, liquidating $351M in bearish bets.Investor risk appetite is rising, fueled by Fed signals of potential rate cuts.Ethereum Nears $5,000 After 4-Year HighEthereum’s native token ETH rallied to $4,701 on Friday, its highest level since November 2021. The surge liquidated more than $351 million in bearish futures positions, underscoring renewed bullish dominance in the market.﻿The rally comes amid improving macro conditions. U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell hinted at a more accommodative monetary stance at the Jackson Hole Economic Symposium, boosting investor confidence in risk assets.With ETH trading above $4,800 at press time, analysts say the long-awaited breakout to $5,000 could be imminent.Nasdaq Rally Signals Risk-On ShiftThe Nasdaq index gained 1.8%, reinforcing the trend of investors moving away from bonds and back into equities and digital assets. Ethereum has already climbed 33% in the last 30 days, outpacing Bitcoin and most altcoins.Powell’s remarks further shifted expectations: bond traders now see a 45% probability of U.S. rates falling to 3.5% or below by March 2026, compared to 37% last week. Lower borrowing costs reduce financial stress and generally boost liquidity for risk assets like ETH.On-Chain Data Confirms Ethereum’s StrengthEthereum’s network activity is accelerating rapidly:Transactions: +63% in 30 days.Active addresses: +26% in the same period.By comparison, Solana saw just a 2% rise in transactions, with active addresses down 14%. BNB Chain registered a 50% drop in transaction count.This divergence underscores Ethereum’s dominance as the primary smart contract platform powering DeFi, NFTs, and Web3 growth.Futures Market Signals ResilienceDespite liquidations, ETH’s open interest remains steady at 14.4M ETH (~$69B), reflecting continued appetite for leveraged exposure. Futures premiums have risen to 7% annualized, up from 4% earlier in the week, signaling healthy optimism without overheating.﻿According to analyst JA_Maartun, Ethereum futures buyers haven’t shown this level of aggressiveness in over a month — a clear sign of building conviction behind the rally.Can ETH Finally Break $5K?While BNB and Tron already trade above their 2021 highs, Ethereum still trails its previous record of $4,868. That gap remains a psychological hurdle, but current metrics suggest ETH may be ready to close it in the coming days.If Ethereum convincingly breaks above $5,000, analysts expect momentum could carry the price higher into price discovery territory, with institutional ETF flows and on-chain activity reinforcing the trend.Ethereum’s rally is being powered by booming network activity, robust futures demand, and a macro-driven shift toward risk assets. With ETH just shy of its all-time high, the stage is set for a potential breakout to $5,000 and beyoond.

data.title: Ethereum News Today: Ethereum Hits New All-Time High Above $4,870 as Fed Turns Dovish, ETFs Drive Bullish Momentum
data.description: Key Takeaways:ETH breaks past $4,867, surpassing its November 2021 record.Price is up 250% from April lows, fueled by dovish Fed policy.$287.6M in Ether ETF inflows mark strong institutional demand.Corporate treasuries hold nearly $30B in ETH, adding structural support.Bitcoin dominance falls below 60%, signaling capital rotation into altcoins.ETH Crosses Record Highs After Powell’s SpeechEthereum surged past $4,870 on Coinbase Friday, setting a new all-time high and closing a chapter on the long consolidation since November 2021. The breakout followed Fed Chair Jerome Powell’s dovish remarks at the Jackson Hole symposium, where he signaled higher odds of a 25 bps rate cut in September.ETH jumped 14% on the day, extending its rebound to 250% since April’s $1,385 low. Powell’s comments on labor market stability and restrictive policy fueled expectations of looser liquidity — a tailwind for risk assets like Ethereum.ETF Inflows and Treasury Demand Reinforce RallyInvestor flows are confirming ETH’s strength:On Aug. 21, Ether ETFs pulled in $287.6M after a four-day outflow streak, lifting total ETH ETF holdings above $12.12B.Corporate treasuries, including BitMine, SharpLink, BTCS, and GameSquare, have acquired nearly $1.6B in ETH over the past month, swelling total corporate reserves to $29.75B.Ray Youssef, CEO of NoOnes, said ETH is increasingly viewed as a utility-rich reserve asset, not just a speculative token.Analyst Targets: $7,500 to $25,000Forecasts are turning more aggressive. Standard Chartered lifted its 2025 year-end ETH price target to $7,500 (from $4,000), projecting $25,000 by 2028.Hyblock analysts noted that ETH’s rally is supported by real demand absorbing OG supply, unlike past tops where early investors capped momentum. With ETF inflows, treasury adoption, and supportive U.S. regulation under the GENIUS Act, ETH may be in what they called a “perfect storm.”Bitcoin Dominance Declines as “Altseason” BeginsEthereum’s surge coincides with a drop in Bitcoin dominance below 60%, the lowest since March. At its yearly peak, BTC commanded 66% of crypto market share.This shift signals a rotation into altcoins, with ETH leading large-caps. According to CoinShares, ETH-focused products saw $2.86B in inflows in mid-August, compared to Bitcoin’s $552M. Month-to-date, ETH funds added $2.96B, while BTC products recorded $21M in outflows.Ethereum’s breakout to new highs above $4,870 is being fueled by a dovish Federal Reserve, record ETF inflows, and surging corporate treasury adoption. With Bitcoin dominance falling and altcoin season taking shape, analysts say the stage is set for ETH to test $5,000 and potentially climb toward $7,500 in the coming months.

data.title: Binance Futures to Launch WLFIUSDT Perpetual Contract with Pre-Market Trading
data.description: Key Takeaways:Binance Futures will list USDⓈ-M WLFIUSDT perpetual contracts with up to 5x leverage starting Aug. 23, 2025, at 08:30 UTC.The contract will support pre-market trading with capped funding rates of +0.005% during the initial phase.WLFI is the governance token of World Liberty Financial, with a total supply of 100 billion WLFI.Trading will run 24/7 under Binance’s Multi-Assets Mode, allowing margin in assets like BTC.WLFIUSDT Perpetual Contract DetailsBinance Futures has announced the launch of USDⓈ-Margined WLFIUSDT perpetual contracts, offering traders exposure to World Liberty Financial’s governance token (WLFI).Launch time: Aug. 23, 2025, at 08:30 UTCLeverage: Up to 5xSettlement asset: USDTTotal WLFI supply: 100 billion tokensTrading hours: 24/7, with support for Multi-Assets ModeThe new listing is part of Binance Futures’ effort to expand product choices while enhancing liquidity and flexibility for users.Pre-Market Trading and Mark Price MechanismDuring the pre-market phase, mark prices will be calculated using the 10-second rolling average of trade prices, with a ±1% price cap to control volatility. Once a stable spot index price is established, the contract will transition to standard perpetual pricing.Capped funding rate (pre-market): +0.005%Funding rate (post pre-market): up to +2.00% / -2.00%Funding interval: Every 4 hoursMargin & Risk ControlsThe WLFIUSDT contract will feature tiered leverage and margin requirements:Up to 5,000 USDT positions: 5x leverage, 10% maintenance marginUp to 200,000 USDT positions: 1x leverage, 50% margin requirementBinance noted it may adjust contract specifications, including leverage, margin, and funding rates, in response to market conditions.Important NotesPre-market trading will end once WLFI spot markets go live; at that point, the contract will convert to a standard perpetual futures contract.Listing on Binance Futures does not guarantee a Binance Spot listing.The contract will be included in Binance’s Futures New Listing Fee Promotion campaign.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Launch Multiple Network (MTP) on August 25
data.description: Key Points:Binance Alpha will launch Multiple Network (MTP) on August 25, 2025.Eligible users can claim MTP airdrops using Alpha Points on the Binance Alpha event page.Further details, including allocation rules and claim mechanics, will be announced separately.Binance Alpha Prepares for MTP LaunchBinance Alpha announced it will officially launch Multiple Network (MTP) on August 25, 2025. The listing adds another token to Alpha’s growing ecosystem, giving early adopters a chance to participate in its debut.Following the launch, eligible users will be able to claim MTP airdrops by redeeming Alpha Points via the Alpha event page once trading opens.Airdrop Claim & ParticipationThe airdrop program is designed to reward active Alpha participants. Users must meet eligibility criteria and hold sufficient Alpha Points to unlock their allocations.Binance stated that detailed guidelines on claim mechanics, distribution amounts, and participation requirements will be shared in a follow-up announcement ahead of launch day.
